title: dianthus grossheimii
intro: Dianthus grossheimii, also known as the Himalayan pink or Himalayan pink flower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as colds and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Dianthus grossheimii include its ability to help reduce fever, alleviate respiratory congestion, and soothe digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Dianthus grossheimii can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for easy incorporation into a holistic health regimen.
